Flat concept inventory:
- Large Model-based Data Augmentation | papers: 88e8801e4daf404d3d40f1648ef29faeb8e6d58a; c0e8812789e96f5a7aa3ad940dba1c237aec822d; a2d2bbe4c542173662a444b33b76c66992697830; 064ccebc03d3afabaae30fe29a457c1cfcdff7e3; 01843a69f5c8a66da06ca883aabaa86ffa2b3fd8; c346bfb9b2e2730ee3aa392fd17956416191e38d; 58f76272b977077b2e0d62f5ce201234022e9cc5; 940da2b97449e3aaa138570cebb7064a53210b11; e21a2fba6ff48a87a59109ee8f68f787a1b46e72; 04e541391e8dce14d099d00fb2c21dbbd8afe87f; 23e261a20a315059b4de5492ed071c97a20c12e7; 8f8dedb511c0324d1cb7f9750560109ca9290b5f; 7f0e374f1920d962359d7e9ccb7a7d7e2d18e6f4; bc7f3507e62fba8fd6b94f859d73fd6250ff9625; 7002ae048e4b8c9133a55428441e8066070995cb; f335f50b2f1979ec151caecb33cb8cdc5afd48aa; 1e05c5427d6a35a3b1bf37fb955f2ea94995a71d; b000d6865db824af1563708fb7a545ddd65c6b3a; 8d531cb8cf51eec3b8f1106d189295fa3c81c02a; dce62170e8be820bcec51aae2eceed3943ca6c9a; a6ad30123bef4b19ee40c3d63cfabf00d211f0ef; dc563ae2179a79a3b58749bc142a719e009d6cc5; 9e99648c5d4d9ce4fba73007291bbd3f804c83ea; 272a6507c3115c76566ff49cb4f831622929ab67; bb67e7d347fd765e61d43a78d7fd997cb99e8f94; 9385f15567e0bd2c3a54e9627ca354a865fcb008; f6bda03c004c858f87cf580fd31bf0ae4d3e4f2a; f677fc0f6a7a4f7b324b8f14700e14715cb06bca; 994a1ce6677b496bd3c0c63aceafc6556005e994; f4c62aa336de45273e0fdfcfbd65b3c2e552ad56; 6f84447bbf037a4102904eba308fecbbc97ccabb; 57be0448d168e8d6d0b6e0d1a4405fb5fbaa1b56; 8c43a6c17c5dd03b99a8ad2646404664e9a8b52a; 95ca7eb71b2aea74d7bbe23252e41c03070b807d; efbe97d20c4ffe356e8826c01dc550bacc405add; 83b8e18488d8f31dd017ec0b26531cef4b635b36; 5406129d9d7d00dc310671c43597101b0ee93629; 144eca44e250cc462f6fc3a172abb865978f66f5; dc0c132b273456b288a785414db2fa72edf87b1a; d4b0fa75565e873eea165e7059435bb55ddeb9ef; 9733025aea2ba71792be10c18d635e8fc1455e31; e15900cf7c93d4b6e45a12fe3534840c910467e1; 1a3d6119d9513ad27fa4fc3262e517ec6a6d2261; 39a9beda08f4bf33d800fa6bf2e9fdde12d0a118; c3a1a52c3964b66af9d5fc03bc7353ebe6fd2beb; 156c1b14d1160ba9802615d37e8b827a13282a4e; f06ffb43f588575aa910d9e7cc38958e0410d496; 2238c293edcefbfc0b5966f27d82c560e66cae1b; 3728aec0c3e720e7f3f22e1306a98bd0013d47ad; 1e682f314fadec3170222d37a9f1569064d695db; 4ffa3a6fe622cafa04f085d743c3a9a7957e4458; 496658ac0483942a8720407f16bb94227f5627fe; 8f0a24d1678e4d0e584b0932196cd257d5c53c7d; c0f26279b8a296dd24e80e1c671dc526b132d12d; bbfdcbfee1762d48cae9db8637f21ea3c234ba30; 4e36db22808c1d677438137b10979a9279fb6c1f; eb9b568cc98909af92ae5295a6ca526d8c349b68; ae7f67c705c12391f7198527a0b962340ac8d39c; 6f7e03e4ccd26c762090e25dc5d2eb1e1f8c641d; 484b4e96428a7d3ab46330a15b14278ca7bd68ca; 9e3d8d3d9afdf9888039dc75dea23b0c7b3cb338; ba9d2d3947be490692f56cb6ab3e09b408cda4c0; 10af858834ad69f1c30721e6aa732d77fa369161; 76e287f89bcfa45389293c007e86c46f878a7f9e; 5e8d3c2dc0fc53949794fc00600e25558c4a2441; f8b9929fde93c170fd284b17ea812a9031be8858; 23c265ba884b92ecbd9d18641078d964697e4590; 7f3bc301ae0e2bbb78a0d42f074865e87d908f9a; 3004a6298dd5216f163b43074a90db7cdad52df9; 667b3fa29fa2563c22d59684bf84548aac897abf; 423cbdde746d691deb23263005e587ec087d2cdc; 586bdad62d35342ec4aae0dd539379fff1ea4547; 81765386bd5f1165947dab94f66e02acc5d71e13; ee1fdc0e4391f2ef7d3222d47d8677c574fcd95c; 952997b4d41a87a00425ee2d731880cbb13606a5; a26a7a74f1e5fd562be95c3611a0680759fbdf84; de4635e95259118a545fdc0682407f416c16086a; 765ab4d0db283198d2c64d8b36f53c657d11f85a; 27a2fcf61e056590959099b551ed9709caa5b7bd; 85d361beea081193616cc4d26ffb32171c612a0b; 732ba2a13526fc828076a2e57277aed9ddcff198; 2ea5b0f5e476ddc00ae4450f2888a51fa25dd1d3; 06c8f8aa5d9fc02ea8ba35010e5b1e8420014c62; 7fc23bc11fde815b7735b115ffe5c57ff0d6cc93; c135ed2228fe3c5a2f7e6fdb20a0d814d6cd7bf3; 6036d4765c7608d8136cc425a2c84be6f1253c23; df1547089aa62190981514cf8f5bd421e32cc90f; cad55b335aa0e595ebf5bf7c16e4041cd7fb47a0; 8f94ce927e003dce0f3116769a6e5b8cb6a4efc8; ad4a0938c48e61b7827869e4ac3baffd0aefab35; 231af7dc01a166cac3b5b01ca05778238f796e41; 6f870f7f02a8c59c3e23f407f3ef00dd1dcf8fc4; 5b19bf6c3f4b25cac96362c98b930cf4b37f6744
- Approach | papers: 88e8801e4daf404d3d40f1648ef29faeb8e6d58a; c0e8812789e96f5a7aa3ad940dba1c237aec822d; a2d2bbe4c542173662a444b33b76c66992697830; 064ccebc03d3afabaae30fe29a457c1cfcdff7e3; 01843a69f5c8a66da06ca883aabaa86ffa2b3fd8; c346bfb9b2e2730ee3aa392fd17956416191e38d; 58f76272b977077b2e0d62f5ce201234022e9cc5; 940da2b97449e3aaa138570cebb7064a53210b11; e21a2fba6ff48a87a59109ee8f68f787a1b46e72; 04e541391e8dce14d099d00fb2c21dbbd8afe87f; 23e261a20a315059b4de5492ed071c97a20c12e7; 8f8dedb511c0324d1cb7f9750560109ca9290b5f; 7f0e374f1920d962359d7e9ccb7a7d7e2d18e6f4; bc7f3507e62fba8fd6b94f859d73fd6250ff9625; 7002ae048e4b8c9133a55428441e8066070995cb; f335f50b2f1979ec151caecb33cb8cdc5afd48aa; 1e05c5427d6a35a3b1bf37fb955f2ea94995a71d; b000d6865db824af1563708fb7a545ddd65c6b3a; 8d531cb8cf51eec3b8f1106d189295fa3c81c02a; dce62170e8be820bcec51aae2eceed3943ca6c9a; a6ad30123bef4b19ee40c3d63cfabf00d211f0ef; dc563ae2179a79a3b58749bc142a719e009d6cc5; 9e99648c5d4d9ce4fba73007291bbd3f804c83ea; 272a6507c3115c76566ff49cb4f831622929ab67; bb67e7d347fd765e61d43a78d7fd997cb99e8f94; 9385f15567e0bd2c3a54e9627ca354a865fcb008; f6bda03c004c858f87cf580fd31bf0ae4d3e4f2a; f677fc0f6a7a4f7b324b8f14700e14715cb06bca; 994a1ce6677b496bd3c0c63aceafc6556005e994; f4c62aa336de45273e0fdfcfbd65b3c2e552ad56; 6f84447bbf037a4102904eba308fecbbc97ccabb; 57be0448d168e8d6d0b6e0d1a4405fb5fbaa1b56; 8c43a6c17c5dd03b99a8ad2646404664e9a8b52a; 95ca7eb71b2aea74d7bbe23252e41c03070b807d; efbe97d20c4ffe356e8826c01dc550bacc405add; 83b8e18488d8f31dd017ec0b26531cef4b635b36; 5406129d9d7d00dc310671c43597101b0ee93629; 144eca44e250cc462f6fc3a172abb865978f66f5; dc0c132b273456b288a785414db2fa72edf87b1a; d4b0fa75565e873eea165e7059435bb55ddeb9ef; 9733025aea2ba71792be10c18d635e8fc1455e31; e15900cf7c93d4b6e45a12fe3534840c910467e1; 1a3d6119d9513ad27fa4fc3262e517ec6a6d2261; 39a9beda08f4bf33d800fa6bf2e9fdde12d0a118; c3a1a52c3964b66af9d5fc03bc7353ebe6fd2beb; 156c1b14d1160ba9802615d37e8b827a13282a4e; f06ffb43f588575aa910d9e7cc38958e0410d496; 2238c293edcefbfc0b5966f27d82c560e66cae1b; 3728aec0c3e720e7f3f22e1306a98bd0013d47ad; 1e682f314fadec3170222d37a9f1569064d695db; 4ffa3a6fe622cafa04f085d743c3a9a7957e4458; 496658ac0483942a8720407f16bb94227f5627fe; 8f0a24d1678e4d0e584b0932196cd257d5c53c7d; c0f26279b8a296dd24e80e1c671dc526b132d12d; bbfdcbfee1762d48cae9db8637f21ea3c234ba30; 4e36db22808c1d677438137b10979a9279fb6c1f; eb9b568cc98909af92ae5295a6ca526d8c349b68; ae7f67c705c12391f7198527a0b962340ac8d39c; 6f7e03e4ccd26c762090e25dc5d2eb1e1f8c641d; 484b4e96428a7d3ab46330a15b14278ca7bd68ca; 9e3d8d3d9afdf9888039dc75dea23b0c7b3cb338; ba9d2d3947be490692f56cb6ab3e09b408cda4c0; 10af858834ad69f1c30721e6aa732d77fa369161; 76e287f89bcfa45389293c007e86c46f878a7f9e; 5e8d3c2dc0fc53949794fc00600e25558c4a2441; f8b9929fde93c170fd284b17ea812a9031be8858; 23c265ba884b92ecbd9d18641078d964697e4590; 7f3bc301ae0e2bbb78a0d42f074865e87d908f9a; 3004a6298dd5216f163b43074a90db7cdad52df9; 667b3fa29fa2563c22d59684bf84548aac897abf; 423cbdde746d691deb23263005e587ec087d2cdc; 586bdad62d35342ec4aae0dd539379fff1ea4547; 81765386bd5f1165947dab94f66e02acc5d71e13; ee1fdc0e4391f2ef7d3222d47d8677c574fcd95c; 952997b4d41a87a00425ee2d731880cbb13606a5; a26a7a74f1e5fd562be95c3611a0680759fbdf84; de4635e95259118a545fdc0682407f416c16086a; 765ab4d0db283198d2c64d8b36f53c657d11f85a; 27a2fcf61e056590959099b551ed9709caa5b7bd; 85d361beea081193616cc4d26ffb32171c612a0b; 732ba2a13526fc828076a2e57277aed9ddcff198
- Image Augmentation | papers: 88e8801e4daf404d3d40f1648ef29faeb8e6d58a; c0e8812789e96f5a7aa3ad940dba1c237aec822d; a2d2bbe4c542173662a444b33b76c66992697830; 064ccebc03d3afabaae30fe29a457c1cfcdff7e3; 01843a69f5c8a66da06ca883aabaa86ffa2b3fd8; c346bfb9b2e2730ee3aa392fd17956416191e38d; 58f76272b977077b2e0d62f5ce201234022e9cc5; 940da2b97449e3aaa138570cebb7064a53210b11; e21a2fba6ff48a87a59109ee8f68f787a1b46e72; 04e541391e8dce14d099d00fb2c21dbbd8afe87f; 23e261a20a315059b4de5492ed071c97a20c12e7; 8f8dedb511c0324d1cb7f9750560109ca9290b5f; 7f0e374f1920d962359d7e9ccb7a7d7e2d18e6f4; bc7f3507e62fba8fd6b94f859d73fd6250ff9625; 7002ae048e4b8c9133a55428441e8066070995cb; f335f50b2f1979ec151caecb33cb8cdc5afd48aa; 1e05c5427d6a35a3b1bf37fb955f2ea94995a71d; b000d6865db824af1563708fb7a545ddd65c6b3a; 8d531cb8cf51eec3b8f1106d189295fa3c81c02a; dce62170e8be820bcec51aae2eceed3943ca6c9a; a6ad30123bef4b19ee40c3d63cfabf00d211f0ef; dc563ae2179a79a3b58749bc142a719e009d6cc5; 9e99648c5d4d9ce4fba73007291bbd3f804c83ea; 272a6507c3115c76566ff49cb4f831622929ab67; bb67e7d347fd765e61d43a78d7fd997cb99e8f94; 9385f15567e0bd2c3a54e9627ca354a865fcb008; f6bda03c004c858f87cf580fd31bf0ae4d3e4f2a; f677fc0f6a7a4f7b324b8f14700e14715cb06bca; 994a1ce6677b496bd3c0c63aceafc6556005e994; f4c62aa336de45273e0fdfcfbd65b3c2e552ad56; 6f84447bbf037a4102904eba308fecbbc97ccabb; 57be0448d168e8d6d0b6e0d1a4405fb5fbaa1b56; 8c43a6c17c5dd03b99a8ad2646404664e9a8b52a; 95ca7eb71b2aea74d7bbe23252e41c03070b807d; efbe97d20c4ffe356e8826c01dc550bacc405add; 83b8e18488d8f31dd017ec0b26531cef4b635b36; 5406129d9d7d00dc310671c43597101b0ee93629; 144eca44e250cc462f6fc3a172abb865978f66f5; dc0c132b273456b288a785414db2fa72edf87b1a; d4b0fa75565e873eea165e7059435bb55ddeb9ef; 9733025aea2ba71792be10c18d635e8fc1455e31; e15900cf7c93d4b6e45a12fe3534840c910467e1; 1a3d6119d9513ad27fa4fc3262e517ec6a6d2261
- Prompt-driven | papers: 88e8801e4daf404d3d40f1648ef29faeb8e6d58a; c0e8812789e96f5a7aa3ad940dba1c237aec822d; a2d2bbe4c542173662a444b33b76c66992697830; 064ccebc03d3afabaae30fe29a457c1cfcdff7e3; 01843a69f5c8a66da06ca883aabaa86ffa2b3fd8; c346bfb9b2e2730ee3aa392fd17956416191e38d; 58f76272b977077b2e0d62f5ce201234022e9cc5; 940da2b97449e3aaa138570cebb7064a53210b11; e21a2fba6ff48a87a59109ee8f68f787a1b46e72; 04e541391e8dce14d099d00fb2c21dbbd8afe87f; 23e261a20a315059b4de5492ed071c97a20c12e7; 8f8dedb511c0324d1cb7f9750560109ca9290b5f; 7f0e374f1920d962359d7e9ccb7a7d7e2d18e6f4; bc7f3507e62fba8fd6b94f859d73fd6250ff9625; 7002ae048e4b8c9133a55428441e8066070995cb; f335f50b2f1979ec151caecb33cb8cdc5afd48aa; 1e05c5427d6a35a3b1bf37fb955f2ea94995a71d; b000d6865db824af1563708fb7a545ddd65c6b3a; 8d531cb8cf51eec3b8f1106d189295fa3c81c02a; dce62170e8be820bcec51aae2eceed3943ca6c9a; a6ad30123bef4b19ee40c3d63cfabf00d211f0ef; dc563ae2179a79a3b58749bc142a719e009d6cc5; 9e99648c5d4d9ce4fba73007291bbd3f804c83ea; 272a6507c3115c76566ff49cb4f831622929ab67; bb67e7d347fd765e61d43a78d7fd997cb99e8f94; 9385f15567e0bd2c3a54e9627ca354a865fcb008; f6bda03c004c858f87cf580fd31bf0ae4d3e4f2a; f677fc0f6a7a4f7b324b8f14700e14715cb06bca; 994a1ce6677b496bd3c0c63aceafc6556005e994; f4c62aa336de45273e0fdfcfbd65b3c2e552ad56; 6f84447bbf037a4102904eba308fecbbc97ccabb; 57be0448d168e8d6d0b6e0d1a4405fb5fbaa1b56; 8c43a6c17c5dd03b99a8ad2646404664e9a8b52a; 95ca7eb71b2aea74d7bbe23252e41c03070b807d; efbe97d20c4ffe356e8826c01dc550bacc405add
- Text Prompt-driven | papers: 88e8801e4daf404d3d40f1648ef29faeb8e6d58a; c0e8812789e96f5a7aa3ad940dba1c237aec822d; a2d2bbe4c542173662a444b33b76c66992697830; 064ccebc03d3afabaae30fe29a457c1cfcdff7e3; 01843a69f5c8a66da06ca883aabaa86ffa2b3fd8; c346bfb9b2e2730ee3aa392fd17956416191e38d; 58f76272b977077b2e0d62f5ce201234022e9cc5; 940da2b97449e3aaa138570cebb7064a53210b11; e21a2fba6ff48a87a59109ee8f68f787a1b46e72; 04e541391e8dce14d099d00fb2c21dbbd8afe87f; 23e261a20a315059b4de5492ed071c97a20c12e7; 8f8dedb511c0324d1cb7f9750560109ca9290b5f; 7f0e374f1920d962359d7e9ccb7a7d7e2d18e6f4; bc7f3507e62fba8fd6b94f859d73fd6250ff9625; 7002ae048e4b8c9133a55428441e8066070995cb; f335f50b2f1979ec151caecb33cb8cdc5afd48aa; 1e05c5427d6a35a3b1bf37fb955f2ea94995a71d; b000d6865db824af1563708fb7a545ddd65c6b3a; 8d531cb8cf51eec3b8f1106d189295fa3c81c02a; dce62170e8be820bcec51aae2eceed3943ca6c9a; a6ad30123bef4b19ee40c3d63cfabf00d211f0ef
- Visual Prompt-driven | papers: dc563ae2179a79a3b58749bc142a719e009d6cc5; 9e99648c5d4d9ce4fba73007291bbd3f804c83ea; 272a6507c3115c76566ff49cb4f831622929ab67; bb67e7d347fd765e61d43a78d7fd997cb99e8f94
- Multimodal Prompt-driven | papers: 9385f15567e0bd2c3a54e9627ca354a865fcb008; f6bda03c004c858f87cf580fd31bf0ae4d3e4f2a; f677fc0f6a7a4f7b324b8f14700e14715cb06bca; 994a1ce6677b496bd3c0c63aceafc6556005e994; f4c62aa336de45273e0fdfcfbd65b3c2e552ad56; 6f84447bbf037a4102904eba308fecbbc97ccabb; 57be0448d168e8d6d0b6e0d1a4405fb5fbaa1b56; 8c43a6c17c5dd03b99a8ad2646404664e9a8b52a; 95ca7eb71b2aea74d7bbe23252e41c03070b807d; efbe97d20c4ffe356e8826c01dc550bacc405add
- Subject-driven | papers: 83b8e18488d8f31dd017ec0b26531cef4b635b36; 5406129d9d7d00dc310671c43597101b0ee93629; 144eca44e250cc462f6fc3a172abb865978f66f5; dc0c132b273456b288a785414db2fa72edf87b1a; d4b0fa75565e873eea165e7059435bb55ddeb9ef; 9733025aea2ba71792be10c18d635e8fc1455e31; e15900cf7c93d4b6e45a12fe3534840c910467e1; 1a3d6119d9513ad27fa4fc3262e517ec6a6d2261
- Text Augmentation | papers: 39a9beda08f4bf33d800fa6bf2e9fdde12d0a118; c3a1a52c3964b66af9d5fc03bc7353ebe6fd2beb; 156c1b14d1160ba9802615d37e8b827a13282a4e; f06ffb43f588575aa910d9e7cc38958e0410d496; 2238c293edcefbfc0b5966f27d82c560e66cae1b; 3728aec0c3e720e7f3f22e1306a98bd0013d47ad; 1e682f314fadec3170222d37a9f1569064d695db; 4ffa3a6fe622cafa04f085d743c3a9a7957e4458; 496658ac0483942a8720407f16bb94227f5627fe; 8f0a24d1678e4d0e584b0932196cd257d5c53c7d; c0f26279b8a296dd24e80e1c671dc526b132d12d; bbfdcbfee1762d48cae9db8637f21ea3c234ba30; 4e36db22808c1d677438137b10979a9279fb6c1f; eb9b568cc98909af92ae5295a6ca526d8c349b68; ae7f67c705c12391f7198527a0b962340ac8d39c; 6f7e03e4ccd26c762090e25dc5d2eb1e1f8c641d; 484b4e96428a7d3ab46330a15b14278ca7bd68ca; 9e3d8d3d9afdf9888039dc75dea23b0c7b3cb338; ba9d2d3947be490692f56cb6ab3e09b408cda4c0; 10af858834ad69f1c30721e6aa732d77fa369161; 76e287f89bcfa45389293c007e86c46f878a7f9e; 5e8d3c2dc0fc53949794fc00600e25558c4a2441; f8b9929fde93c170fd284b17ea812a9031be8858; 23c265ba884b92ecbd9d18641078d964697e4590; 7f3bc301ae0e2bbb78a0d42f074865e87d908f9a; 3004a6298dd5216f163b43074a90db7cdad52df9; 667b3fa29fa2563c22d59684bf84548aac897abf; 423cbdde746d691deb23263005e587ec087d2cdc; 586bdad62d35342ec4aae0dd539379fff1ea4547; 81765386bd5f1165947dab94f66e02acc5d71e13; ee1fdc0e4391f2ef7d3222d47d8677c574fcd95c; 952997b4d41a87a00425ee2d731880cbb13606a5; a26a7a74f1e5fd562be95c3611a0680759fbdf84; de4635e95259118a545fdc0682407f416c16086a; 765ab4d0db283198d2c64d8b36f53c657d11f85a
- Label-based | papers: 39a9beda08f4bf33d800fa6bf2e9fdde12d0a118; c3a1a52c3964b66af9d5fc03bc7353ebe6fd2beb; 156c1b14d1160ba9802615d37e8b827a13282a4e; f06ffb43f588575aa910d9e7cc38958e0410d496; 2238c293edcefbfc0b5966f27d82c560e66cae1b; 3728aec0c3e720e7f3f22e1306a98bd0013d47ad; 1e682f314fadec3170222d37a9f1569064d695db; 4ffa3a6fe622cafa04f085d743c3a9a7957e4458; 496658ac0483942a8720407f16bb94227f5627fe; 8f0a24d1678e4d0e584b0932196cd257d5c53c7d; c0f26279b8a296dd24e80e1c671dc526b132d12d; bbfdcbfee1762d48cae9db8637f21ea3c234ba30
